description: click by text returned ambiguity error. Pivot to a more specific selector or index.

seed.content:
[Current page context — applies to this user message and supersedes older page context for phrases like "this page". URL: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0EXAMPLE — Title: Acme Widget — Amazon]

add this to cart

seed.name: click
seed.content: {"success":false,"error":"Ambiguous: 4 elements match \"Add\" (exact). Use a more specific text, click({index: N}) from get_interactive_elements, or a selector."}

antiPatterns.reason: Broader matching makes ambiguity worse, not better.

expected.successRubric: Use a more specific text ("Add to Cart" — the actual Amazon button) OR call get_interactive_elements first and use the index.
